unresolved_items: reviewer-codex:group-1: Terminal closeout is still not derived from one canonical post-repair evidence object, so the final-round ultimatum path can emit stale machine-facing artifacts and PM-003 is still not single-shaped across writers.

reviewer-claude:group-1: Ultimatum-branch evidence is still not fully canonical: (a) self_check_issue_count is read from different sources in run-postmortem vs cycle-postmortem when the ultimatum revision runs, and (b) the ultimatum revision's updated compliance map and fix-items map are never persisted to the canonical round-artifact locations before returning.
improvements_applied: Board and zero-round closeout now emit the same canonical PM-003 field set, and cycle-postmortem PM-003 now includes review_issue_count in total_issue_count.
Revision-mode component repair now requires a non-empty fix_items_map section and blocks immediately when it is missing.
run-postmortem PM-003 now exposes validation_issue_count, self_check_issue_count, review_issue_count, and total_issue_count on both board and zero-round paths.
cycle-postmortem PM-003 now includes review_issue_count and a total_issue_count that includes review-phase findings.
